---
title: "Student Performance Analysis"
description: "A simple Python project exploring the relationship between study time and grades."
author: "Serena Emedeke"
date: 2026-04-16
categories: [Python, Data Analysis]
---

## Overview

This project explores how study hours relate to student performance.

## Python Code

```{python}
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame({
    "StudyHours": [1, 2, 3, 4, 5],
    "Score": [50, 55, 65, 72, 85]
})

df
```

## Reflection

This project helped me practise using Python for simple data analysis.
